🔊 Add sound to opencode when done
description:
To add sound notifications to the OpenCode CLI on macOS, use the opencode-smart-voice-notify plugin. Install it by adding opencode-smart-voice-notify@latest to the plugin array in your ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json config file. Alternatively, create custom Bash scripts using afplay triggered by JavaScript plugins in ~/.config/opencode/plugins/. 
GitHub
GitHub
 +2
Here are the specific methods to add sound to OpenCode CLI on macOS:
Method 1: Using the opencode-smart-voice-notify Plugin (Recommended) 
This plugin plays sounds and sends notifications when tasks complete, errors occur, or permissions are needed. 
GitHub
GitHub
Edit Config: Open or create ~/.config/opencode/opencode.json.
Add Plugin: Update it to include the plugin:
json
{
  "$schema": "https://opencode.ai/config.json",
  "plugin": ["opencode-smart-voice-notify@latest"]
}
Automatic Setup: Upon running OpenCode, it will automatically install the plugin, generate configuration files, and add .mp3 sound files in ~/.config/opencode/

name: agent orchestration
description:
I want to create an agent orchestration system where in you can see the communication between 2 agents or opencode agents in the terminal. this will run in my computer. There is a simple kanban that documents the task, progress, etc. and agent can reference to the ticket and also update it's status. the user can also see and talk to the agent that works on the ticket. user can click a start button then it opens a terminal where it spawn claude or opencode cli that will work the ticklet. after the back and forth with the user and made a progress, agent can document its progress to the kanban and also report to a general group chat where other AI agent can also see. AI can also tag an agent in the chat to wait for reply.

The structure of the agent is something like this:
1. Agent name: Architect
2. Channel: Claude or opencode
3. Skill: document, coding, github, etc
4. model: opus 4.7 (claude), minimax 2.5 (opencode)

Would this be possible?
